overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a neon-drenched futuristic metropolis. The player crosses busy intersections, walks along sidewalks beneath towering skyscrapers, and explores narrow alleyways and underpasses with vibrant cyberpunk aesthetics.

events.description: blue sports car passes close in front of the camera from left to right
finishing crossing and stepping onto the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking across the broad yellow-striped crosswalk through the neon-lit intersection

notable_agents.action: blue sports car driving across the crosswalk from left to right
group of pedestrians walking toward the camera across the crosswalk

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard displaying 'CHOOH2' in bold letters
towering futuristic buildings covered in glowing neon advertisements and vertical signage

futuristic curved street lights lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a wide futuristic intersection at night, dominated by neon-lit skyscrapers and a prominent CHOOH2 billboard. The camera walks across the yellow-striped crosswalk as a blue sports car passes closely in front, while pedestrians approach from the opposite side.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with palm trees and approaching overpass

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk parallel to the street, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow safety vest walking in the same direction

entered.detail: tall palm trees planted along the sidewalk edge
massive elevated highway or monorail structure spanning across the street ahead
illuminated shop windows and commercial displays along the building facades

segments.scene_description: Walking along the concrete sidewalk flanked by palm trees and futuristic street lamps, the camera moves toward an elevated highway structure in the distance. The neon skyscrapers remain visible ahead while storefronts line the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: area beneath elevated highway with towering skyscrapers visible

events.description: crossing the side street and moving under the elevated highway structure
camera tilts upward to look at the immense skyscrapers towering above the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass and looking up at the surrounding megastructures and neon signage

entered.detail: immensely tall futuristic towers with vertical neon signage extending high above the overpass
massive concrete columns supporting the elevated highway

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses a side street and moves beneath the elevated highway, transitioning to a semi-covered space. Looking upward reveals breathtakingly tall skyscrapers with vertical neon signage towering above the concrete overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley beneath the elevated highway

events.description: turning right into a narrow covered passage running beneath the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit narrow passage beneath the elevated structure

entered.detail: massive yellow and black striped support beams of the elevated highway
storefronts with glowing neon signs and advertisements along the right wall
confined concrete pathway with scattered debris beneath the overpass

segments.scene_description: Turning right into a narrow enclosed alleyway beneath the highway, the scene becomes darker and more confined. The camera moves between massive yellow-striped support beams on the left and neon-lit shopfronts on the right, with no pedestrians visible in this secluded passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining plaza under the overpass with neon lighting

events.description: approaching outdoor seating area with illuminated umbrellas and purple neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking toward an outdoor seating area with neon-lit tables and umbrellas

notable_agents.action: people sitting at outdoor tables under the illuminated umbrellas

entered.detail: large patio umbrellas with purple and pink neon lighting underneath
vibrant red and pink neon signs for bars and restaurants
large rectangular planters with small trees and shrubs

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow alley into a wider plaza beneath the overpass, the camera approaches an outdoor dining area illuminated by purple neon lights. Large umbrellas glow with colored lighting over tables where people are seated, while the massive highway structure recedes into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, bustling city intersection into the secluded, neon-lit underbelly of a futuristic metropolis. It begins by crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk beneath a prominent CHOOH2 billboard as a blue sports car streaks past, moving forward along a concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees and glowing storefronts. As the camera crosses a side street, the open skyline is replaced by the heavy concrete of an elevated highway, shifting the perspective upward toward towering skyscrapers and vertical neon signage. The scene then tightens as the camera turns right into a dark, confined alleyway flanked by massive yellow-striped support beams and secluded shopfronts. Finally, the path opens back up into a wider plaza beneath the overpass, emerging into a vibrant outdoor dining area illuminated by purple neon lights and glowing umbrellas.
